system_prompt:
Open a URL in a headless browser, render JavaScript, and extract the page content. Tools: browser_open, browser_text, browser_close. Return tool calls as JSON with action, tool, and args fields.

CONTEXT: You may receive: userDetails (name, language), location, timezone, and messages. Use these to personalize responses when relevant.

few_shot_examples.input: Open a URL in a headless browser, render JavaScript, and extract the page content
Run browser open with default settings
